title: Fresh Apple Cake with Caramel Frosting
ingredients: 1/2 cup butter, softened at room temperature and cut into 12 pieces
instructions: Add sugar and eggs and beat well.
Combine flour, baking soda, salt, and spices together.
Add dry ingredients to butter mixture and blend until just combined.
Pour into a greased and floured 9x13 inch pan.
Bake at 325 degrees F for 45-50 minutes.
For the frosting, melt butter in a small saucepan until starting to brown.
Stir in brown sugar and salt.
Stir over medium heat until sugar melts.
Add milk and bring to a boil.
Pour into mixing bowl and cool for 10 minutes.
Add powdered sugar and vanilla and beat until spreading consistency.
Add more powdered sugar if needed to thicken.
notes: Butter should be softened at room temperature before blending
Apples should be chopped and peeled before adding to batter
If frosting is too thin, add more powdered sugar to reach desired spreading consistency
